study_group_representative.quote: From Jan 14 to Feb 12, 2020, the Shenzhen Center for Disease Control and Prevention identified 391 SARS-CoV-2 cases and 1286 close contacts.

intervention_and_participants_defined.quote: the Shenzhen Center for Disease Control and Prevention identified 391 SARS-CoV-2 cases and 1286 close contacts. We compared cases identified through symptomatic surveillance and contact tracing

outcome_assessed_for_60pct.quote: RT-PCR testing was required for all close contacts at the beginning of isolation, and release was conditional on a negative RT-PCR result.

follow_up_length_reported.quote: Close contacts and travellers from Hubei who tested negative were quarantined at home or a central facility, and monitored for 14 days.

outcome_definition_objective_precise.quote: Suspected cases and close contacts were tested for SARS-CoV-2 by RT-PCR of nasal swabs at 28 qualified local hospitals, ten district-level CDCs, and two third-party testing organisations, with final confirmation done at the Guangdong Provincial Center for Disease Control and Prevention (Guangdong CDC) or Shenzhen CDC

important_prognostic_factors_accounted_f.quote: In multiple regression models including sex, age, baseline severity, and method of detection, in addition to age, baseline severity was associated with time to recovery

analysis_described_and_effect_quantified.quote: The relative odds of transmission among contacts of various types were estimated by use of conditional logistic regression and random-effects models, to account for differing numbers of possible infected individuals in each risk group.
